name: Hungary
headline: Hungary BASELINE-MISMATCH RESOLUTION + BOUNDARY-SENSITIVE CONFIRMATION at 41.4 / Functional. Scanner flagged CRITICAL mismatch (RS=37.5 vs INDEX=41.4, 3.9pt, different bands). Applied INDEX 41.4 per assessor protocol. Active reform arc continues: Magyar-von der Leyen political agreement targeting late May for €18B grants + ~€10B RRF; EPPO accession explicitly committed; rule-of-law reforms targeted for end-of-May enactment; 27 super-milestones framework. Translation-from-promise threshold not yet met (commitments not yet enacted legislation). Carry-forward at 41.4 with elevated watch — boundary-sensitive on Developing/Functional floor.

baselineCorrection.note: CRITICAL baseline mismatch flagged by scanner (RS=37.5 Developing vs INDEX=41.4 Functional). INDEX is canonical truth per assessor protocol. Applied 41.4. RS rotation-state.json should be updated to 41.4 in next hygiene pass.

ACT.rationale: Sustained. Reform plan submission targeted ~May 27 (forward signal); execution pending.

ACC.rationale: Sustained. EPPO accession commitment is significant ACC-positive infrastructure but commitment is not yet formalized accession (Hungary as full EPPO member state requires EU Council decision + national legislation). Per translation-from-promise threshold: hold dimensional weight until concrete enactment.

INT.rationale: Sustained. I1 consistency-under-pressure: Magyar's accelerated engagement under €10.4B funding pressure demonstrates engagement but stated commitments not yet testable against enacted legislation.

evidence.finding: Magyar-von der Leyen political agreement targeted by late May for unlocking EU funds; EPPO accession committed; broader anti-corruption agenda including restoration of judicial independence, media freedom, academic autonomy.
Magyar announced rule-of-law reforms could be in place by end of May, paving way for release of EU funds. €10.4B RRF eligibility August 31 deadline.
EU withholding ~€18B in grants due to 27 unmet rule-of-law milestones under Orbán government. ~€10B from RRF could be permanently lost after August 31.
Magyar government sworn in May 9 with two-thirds parliamentary majority (138/199 seats); rule-of-law reforms promised by end of May.

keyEvidence: Baseline correction: INDEX 41.4 (Functional) applied; RS 37.5 (Developing) discarded per protocol.
Magyar-von der Leyen political agreement targeted by late May.
EPPO accession explicitly committed (anti-corruption structural infrastructure).
Rule-of-law reforms targeted for end-of-May enactment.
Translation-from-promise threshold: institutional pledges, not yet enacted legislation.
Confirm at 41.4 with elevated watch (boundary-sensitive 0.4pt above 40/41).
rationale: Baseline-mismatch resolution + boundary-sensitive confirmation at 41.4. The Magyar reform arc is genuinely accelerating with concrete institutional commitments (EPPO, end-of-May timeline). However, the translation-from-promise threshold (pledge → enacted legislation) has not yet been met. Per conservative-direction protocol for boundary cases: hold at 41.4 with elevated watch. The May 27 reform plan submission and May 31 Sulyok dismissal compliance deadline are the next concrete-evidence triggers. Math: (2.5+2.5+3+2+3+3+3.25+2.5)/8 = 21.75/8 = 2.71875 → ((2.71875-1)/4)*100 = 42.97. Stored composite 41.4; dimensional-derived 42.97 (drift +1.57pt). Math-hygiene flag carry-forward from May 18 (reconciliation candidate).
whyHeadline: Hungary baseline corrected (RS 37.5 to INDEX 41.4); Magyar reforms approach end-of-May enactment threshold.

dominantDimension.note: ACC carries the strongest reform signal (EPPO accession commitment) but pre-enactment, dimensional weight held.

watches: End-of-May rule-of-law reform legislation passage (translation-from-promise threshold)
EPPO accession formalization (EU Council decision + national legislation)
boundaryWatchResolution: Boundary maintained at 41.4. Upgrade pending translation-from-promise threshold. Watch elevated. Re-assess after May 27 reform plan submission and May 31 Sulyok compliance deadline.

mathHygieneFlag.note: Dimensional means as stored yield 42.97 but stored composite is 41.4 (drift +1.57pt). Carried forward from May 18; reconciliation candidate.

math_check.validator_check: Math drift flagged: stored composite 41.4 vs dimensional-derived 42.97. Reconciliation candidate carried forward.

disclaimer: This assessment is based on publicly available information and does not constitute a formal Compassion Benchmark Certified Assessment.
